UI bundle not built

This is the placeholder the gateway binary embeds when no UI build has been produced yet. To get the actual admin console, run: 

cd ui
pnpm install
pnpm run build

then rebuild the gateway binary. The //go:embed all:dist directive in ui/embed.go will pick up the freshly-built assets.

Until then, the GraphQL surface still works — it lives under /api/graphql.
